title: fagraea imperialis
intro: Fagraea imperialis, also known as the royal Hawaiian frangipani or the imperial frangipani, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands. Its flowers, leaves, and seeds have been traditionally used in medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which help to treat a variety of health conditions. The medicinal properties of Fagraea imperialis have been found to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Fagraea imperialis, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
